---
title: "Case Studies"
subtitle: "Applied UIAO scenarios for FedRAMP-Moderate environments"
doc-type: landing
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-important title="Content pending"}
This section is part of the customer-documents skeleton but has not yet been
authored. The page slugs below are reserved; content will land in line with
the [Customer Documents Roadmap](../ROADMAP.qmd).
:::

Case studies apply UIAO architecture to concrete federal modernization
scenarios, showing how canon-anchored adapters and drift detection behave in
operational contexts.

## Planned pages

| Slug | Scenario | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `cloud-boundary-case-study.md` | Cloud-only authorization boundary, GCC-Moderate | `docs/docs/authorization-boundary.qmd` |
| `federal-modernization-case-study.md` | Multi-year agency modernization walkthrough | `docs/docs/08_ModernizationTimeline.qmd` |
| `identity-modernization-case-study.md` | OrgTree identity modernization end-to-end | `docs/docs/identity_plane_deep_dive_v1.0.qmd` |
